login.verifyFirst: Verify your email before logging in.
login.accountLockedCountdown: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {{minutes}} minutes.
login.accountLockedForgotHint: Or, if you forgot your password,

signup.consent_required: You must accept the Terms and Privacy Policy to continue.
signup.accept_marketing: I would like to receive promotional communications (optional, revocable at any time)

verificationSent.title: Check your email
verificationSent.body: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click the link to activate your account.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.sentMsg: If the email exists, you'll receive a link to reset your password.

reset.title: New password
reset.passwordRules: At least 12 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number.

errors.accountLockedGeneric: Account locked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
